action.description:
Introduced by Senators Roys, Dassler-Alfheim, L. Johnson, Larson, Pfaff, Ratcliff, Smith and Spreitzer; 
cosponsored by Representatives Miresse, Anderson, Arney, Bare, DeSmidt, Hong, Joers, Madison, McCarville, Moore Omokunde, Neubauer, Roe, Stroud, Subeck, Taylor, Tenorio, Udell, Vining and Palmeri
